zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich於1488年出生在英國瓦維其可爾。她於1512年與Robert Welles在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾其福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1553年在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾其福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich于1488年出生在英国瓦維其可爾。她于1512年与Robert Welles在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾其福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1553年在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾其福德。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich was born in 1488, in Warwickshire, England. She married Robert Welles in 1512, in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1553, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich est née en 1488, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Robert Welles en 1512, à Whichford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1553, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Whichford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich wurde 1488 in Warwickshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1512 in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1553 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich è nata il nel 1488 nel Warwickshire, England. Lei sposato Robert Welles nel 1512, nel Whichford, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1553, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Whichford, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrichは1488年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた。1512年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードでRobert Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1553年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich(은)는 1488년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에서 Robert Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich nasceu em 1488, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Robert Welles em 1512, em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1553, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich родилась в 1488 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Welles в 1512 г. в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1553 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Goodrich nació en 1488, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Robert Welles en 1512, en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1553, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
